metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for productivity workflows - skills, agents, commands, and hooks

plugins.name: agent-cli
plugins.description: Bootstrap, evolve, audit, and maintain CLI tools built for AI agents — the spec to scaffold to harden lifecycle distilled from openclaw/clawpatch, crabbox, and clawsweeper

plugins.name: dev-skill
plugins.description: Create, evolve, and validate skills across 9 types — from API references to runbooks to CI/CD workflows

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Development workflow with TDD, debugging, and collaboration skills

plugins.name: app-design
plugins.description: Guided iOS/iPadOS/macOS screen design workflow using Apple Human Interface Guidelines

plugins.name: app-development
plugins.description: Guided iOS/iPadOS data modeling, performance optimization, and debugging workflow using Apple documentation

plugins.name: build-ios-apps
plugins.description: Build iOS apps with workflows for SwiftUI UI work, refactors, performance audits, and simulator debugging.

plugins.name: dev-debug-cpp
plugins.description: C++ debugging for segfaults, memory corruption, threading issues, and linker/ABI problems

plugins.name: dev-python
plugins.description: Modern Python 3.12+ development with uv, ruff, pydantic, FastAPI, Django and production-ready practices

plugins.name: dev-shell
plugins.description: Shell scripting toolkit with Google Style Guide expertise and refactoring capabilities

plugins.name: marketplace
plugins.description: Action toolkit for planning, diagnosing, improving, and operating search, recommender, and pre-member personalisation systems in two-sided trust marketplaces. Seven user-invokable commands plus a context-extractor meta-skill that captures your specific stack, composed over four research-grounded knowledge libraries spanning feature engineering, retrieval planning, pre-member conversion, and personalisation lifecycle. Canonical stack examples: OpenSearch, AWS Personalize, Twilio Segment, Amplitude, Databricks, Datadog — any compatible alternative works via the MCP connector abstraction.
